name: Lantzman Lending - California Hard Money Lenders
description_short: Lantzman Lending is a direct hard money lender serving California and Nevada with private loans from 8% APR and closings in 48-72 hours for real estate investors.
description_long:
Lantzman Lending is a California-based private mortgage lender specializing in hard money loans for real estate investors. Founded on over 50 years of combined lending experience, the company is led by Marc Lantzman (Director, active in real estate since 1980), Justin Lantzman (President, licensed California real estate broker since 2006), and Joel Armstrong (Vice President, also licensed as a Mortgage Agent in Nevada). The firm operates as a direct lender serving California and Nevada, with expansion into the broader Western USA.

The company offers hard money loans designed for real estate investors who need quick capital and flexible terms. Their core product positioning emphasizes speed (same-day approvals, 48-hour closings, 3-day turnaround available), direct lending (no middleman), transparent pricing (no junk fees), and creative loan structuring. Loan rates start at 8% APR. They specifically market to fix-and-flip investors, portfolio buyers, and situations involving inherited properties, foreclosures, and non-traditional scenarios that conventional lenders typically decline.

Lantzman Lending distinguishes itself through several specific operational features: they claim same-day approvals and loans closing in as little as 48 hours; they explicitly advertise "no junk fees"; they provide rehab budgets and fund withholding for loan payment reserves (per customer review); and they retain funds to reduce borrower stress during execution. Customer reviews (4.9/5 average across 47 reviews) highlight responsive communication, on-time closings, professional conduct, and alignment with borrower success. One detailed review specifically contrasts their transparency and ethical practices against industry-wide bait-and-switch tactics.

Honestly assessed, Lantzman Lending operates in the legitimate hard money lending space with documented team credentials, a professional website, and substantiated customer feedback. However, hard money lending inherently carries higher rates (8%+ vs. 3-4% conventional) and stricter terms. The company's rates and fees—while claimed as fair—are not publicly itemized on their website, requiring quote requests. As a private lender, they are less regulated than bank mortgages and appeal specifically to borrowers who cannot or choose not to use conventional financing. Their geographic focus (California/Nevada) limits accessibility.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Direct lender model eliminates middleman markup and accelerates approvals to same-day with closings in 48 hours
Explicitly advertises no junk fees and transparent pricing, directly addressing predatory hard money lender criticism
Provides structured rehab budgets and withholds loan funds to cover payments, reducing borrower cash flow stress during property execution
Combined 50+ years of team experience in real estate development, acquisitions, and mortgage lending with licensed professionals (CA real estate broker, NV mortgage agent)
Strong documented customer reviews (4.9/5 from 47 reviews) emphasizing professionalism, reliability, and ethical conduct vs. industry reputation
Flexible loan structuring designed to accommodate non-conventional scenarios (inherited properties, foreclosures, complex situations conventional lenders decline)
Loans available in as little as 3 days with rates starting at 8% APR for qualified investors
cons: Hard money rates (starting 8%) significantly exceed conventional mortgage rates (typically 3-4%), costing borrowers substantially more over loan term
Loan terms and fee structure not disclosed on website; borrowers must request quotes, preventing price transparency and comparison shopping
Limited geographic availability (California and Nevada primary) restricts access for real estate investors in other states
Hard money loans inherently carry stricter terms, higher down payments, and shorter amortization periods than conventional mortgages, increasing borrower risk
No publicly listed information about loan-to-value ratios, prepayment penalties, or other standard loan terms
best_for: Fix-and-flip investors needing quick capital (48-72 hour closings) to close time-sensitive deals conventional lenders cannot fund
Real estate investors with non-conventional scenarios (inherited properties, foreclosures, multiple properties, complex situations) rejected by traditional lenders
Portfolio builders and developers in California/Nevada seeking flexible hard money terms with responsive, ethical lender partners
Property owners facing foreclosure requiring emergency capital restructuring with experienced lenders who provide rehab planning and fund management
diagnosis: Lantzman Lending is best for real estate investors—fix-and-flip operators, portfolio builders, and owners with complex properties—who need fast capital (48-72 hours) that conventional lenders cannot provide and who can afford the 8%+ hard money rates. The main caveat is that hard money loans cost significantly more than conventional mortgages and carry stricter terms; this lender addresses ethical concerns common in hard money lending but does not reduce the inherent cost or risk of the product itself.
services: Hard money loans for real estate investors with rates starting at 8% APR
Fix-and-flip property financing with customized loan structures
Portfolio/investment property loans for multi-property owners
Inherited and probate property financing including foreclosure scenarios
Bridge financing and gap loans for time-sensitive real estate deals
Same-day loan approvals with 48-72 hour closings
Rehab budgets and cost estimates integrated into loan structure
Loan fund withholding and management to cover borrower payment obligations during property execution
Loans available in 3-day turnaround for expedited closings
California and Nevada lending with Western USA expansion
Instant quote requests online or via phone (858.720.0229)
Direct lender (no broker or middleman intermediation)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 11696 Sorrento Valley Rd STE 201, San Diego, CA 92121
